description: Fun, style, and comfort are the highlights of this black and red nike Max Air backpack. Carry it to college, office, or a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag, with lots of space, it will accomodate everything you can think of, while you strut around looking super funky!MeasurementHeight: 48 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 21 cmCapacity: 30 litresMade of 84% polyester and 16% nylon for enhanced durability and style89% nylon and 11% polyester lining for increased durabilityTwo main zippered compartments to accomodate all your useful itemsOne compartment with a separate well-padded laptop enclosureSecond compartment with a detailed organizer for storing essentialsExterior media-player zip pocket on the front to keep your player secure and protectednike Swoosh printed on media player pocketAdjustable shoulders straps with lightweight yet durable Nike Max Air technology to absorb shock and cushion the shoulder, distributing loads more evenlyErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyWater-resistant tarapaulin bottomHaul loop for handling easeBranding on strapsBranded zippers and sliders for easy useCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
